No films match these filters.
Box office current through 7/1/2026. Figures only change when official numbers post.
Each card shows worldwide gross (WWBO) with its domestic / international split and opening weekend where available. ▲ = still in theatrical release. Gold statuette = Academy Award Best Picture winner. Official theatrical key art shown where verified (506 of 535 titles; other titles show studio brand card).
Release Size filter: wide/limited derived from widest theater count (230 of 535 titles have this data).
Release Type filter: derived from each title's ip_status classification (531 of 535 titles have this data).
Advanced filters (data coverage; a title missing a field is excluded while that filter is active): budget 493/535, RT critics 532/535, RT audience 534/535, MPA rating 532/535. Source: OrchestraMini Box Office Database. Click any card to open its Box Office Mojo page.
